div.p: Welcome to Status Saver ("we," "our," or "us"). This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our mobile application. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting it.
div.div: 🔐 Key Point: We do NOT collect, store, or share any of your personal information. All your saved statuses remain locally on your device.
div.p: We do not collect any personal information from our users. The app functions entirely offline and does not require any registration or login.

ul.li: No Personal Data: We do not collect your name, email, phone number, or any other personal identifiers.
No Location Data: We do not track or store your location.
No Device Identifiers: We do not collect device IDs, IMEI numbers, or advertising IDs.
No Media Access: We only access WhatsApp status files to display and save them. We do not read, upload, or share your personal media.

div.p: Our app requires certain permissions to function properly. These permissions are used solely for their stated purposes:

ul.li: Storage Permission: Required to read WhatsApp status files from the device and to save selected statuses to your device storage.
Internet Permission: Required only for displaying advertisements (Huawei Petal Ads).

div.p: We do not use these permissions for any other purpose.
Our app uses the following third-party services:

ul.li: Huawei Petal Ads (Huawei Ads Kit): We display ads through Huawei's advertising platform. Huawei may collect certain data for personalized advertising purposes. For more details, please refer to Huawei's Privacy Policy: https://consumer.huawei.com/en/privacy/

div.p: You can opt-out of personalized ads through your device settings.
div.div: ⚠️ Important: We are NOT affiliated with WhatsApp, WhatsApp Business, or Meta. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.
div.p: Since all data remains on your device, there is no risk of data breaches from our side. We do not have any servers or databases to store your information.

ul.li: All saved statuses are stored only in your device's local storage.
We do not transmit any data over the internet (except for ads).
We implement reasonable security measures within the app.

div.p: Our app does not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13. We comply with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA). If you believe a child has provided personal information through our app, please contact us immediately.
You have full control over your data:

ul.li: Access: All saved files are accessible on your device.
Delete: You can delete any saved status from within the app.
Control: You can manage permissions through your device settings.

div.p: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted within the app and on this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

div.div: 📱 App: Status Saver - Save WhatsApp Statuses

div.p: If you have any questions, concerns, or suggestions regarding this Privacy Policy or our app, please feel free to contact us:
© 2026 Status Saver | Developed by Abdul Mujahid | All Rights Reserved
This app is not affiliated with WhatsApp or Meta.
